name: PER_NAME_STYLES_VL
query: Select B.NAME_STYLE_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.ALTERNATE_NAME_REQUIRED, T.NAME_STYLE, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_NAME_STYLES_B B, PER_NAME_STYLES_TL T WHERE B.NAME_STYLE_ID=T.NAME_STYLE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = userenv('LANG')
